title: Unified AI trading ecosystem, surpasses 1M users and $1.2B AI agent trading volume
author: Imaginary-Library-80
selftext:
[](https://www.reddit.com/r/AItradingOpportunity/?f=flair_name%3A%22Discussion%22)[https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/15/3295661/0/en/bitget-introduces-unified-ai-trading-ecosystem-surpasses-1m-users-and-1-2b-ai-agent-trading-volume.html](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/15/3295661/0/en/bitget-introduces-unified-ai-trading-ecosystem-surpasses-1m-users-and-1-2b-ai-agent-trading-volume.html)

AI is starting to re-emerge as a stronger narrative in crypto, but the way it’s developing this time looks more structured and less speculative than previous cycles.

Recent data from Bitgetexchange shows that they have rolled out a unified AI trading ecosystem, surpassing 1M users and $1.2B in AI agent trading volume. The development reflects a broader trend where AI is being integrated into exchange infrastructure and trading systems, rather than existing only as a market narrative.

At the same time, the AI sector in crypto is showing a clearer rotation pattern, with attention concentrating around a smaller set of infrastructure and utility-driven assets instead of broad, hype-based movement.

$NEAR has been part of this shift, gaining around +16%, as it continues to be discussed in relation to scalable infrastructure that could support AI-native applications.

$FET is also seeing renewed momentum, up roughly +10%, as interest returns to AI agents and autonomous coordination systems after a quieter period in the narrative.

$RENDER is gradually attracting attention again as well, supported by growing demand for decentralized GPU resources and AI compute infrastructure as workloads become more demanding.

Overall, the current phase of AI in crypto looks less like a single narrative spike and more like an evolving ecosystem, where infrastructure, agents, and compute layers are starting to separate from general market noise.
